name: vercel
description: Vercel deployment ops — list projects, inspect deployments, promote previews. Replaces vercel-cli shelling where MCP coverage is sufficient.
notes: HTTP MCP (not stdio). User memory flag: Vercel hobby tier preview deploys don't work — prod deploys required via --prod. Draft status until verified with real deploys. Per GC.2: use this MCP for inspection (list deployments, fetch status); use the vercel CLI via Bash for promote/deploy.
